mapper.select: SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(s.saleMenuCount) DESC) AS ranking, s.menu_Id, m.menuName, m.menuPrice, SUM(s.saleMenuCount) AS totalSaleCount, SUM(s.saleMenuCount * m.menuPrice) AS totalSalesAmount FROM SALES s JOIN MENUS m ON s.menu_Id = m.menu_Id JOIN MENUC mc ON m.menuCategory_Id = mc.menuCategory_Id JOIN REVENUE r ON s.revenue_Id = r.revenue_Id WHERE mc.bId = #{bId} AND r.revenueDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND r.revenueDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY s.menu_Id, m.menuName, m.menuPrice ORDER BY ranking
SELECT SUM(menuprice * salemenucount) FROM SALES, MENUS

SELECT NVL(SUM(s.saleMenuCount * m.menuPrice), 0) AS totalRevenue FROM SALES s JOIN MENUS m ON s.menu_Id = m.menu_Id JOIN MENUC mc ON m.menuCategory_Id = mc.menuCategory_Id JOIN REVENUE r ON s.revenue_Id = r.revenue_Id WHERE mc.bId = #{bId} AND r.revenueDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND r.revenueDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
